/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Winline -Wformat-security -Wpointer-arith -Wdisabled-optimization -Wno-unknown-pragmas -fstrict-aliasing CMakeFiles/addtiffo.dir/addtiffo.c.o CMakeFiles/addtiffo.dir/tif_overview.c.o CMakeFiles/addtiffo.dir/tif_ovrcache.c.o -o addtiffo  ../../libtiff/libtiff.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libm.so
